name: Purifying Spoon (Ladle)
description:
A phrase of luck is carved into the handle of this wooden ladle. While a variety of other cutlery with similar properties exists, a spoon is often the most convenient and inconspicuous to carry.

Activate - Purify 2 (manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You stir the spoon in food or drink, casting on the substance as you stir. This spoon is perfect for pouring heartwarming meals into bowls. It can purify up to 16 gallons of food or drink.
